name: triage-agent
description: Automated incident triage — correlates alerts with known incidents, assesses severity, escalates to ops

skills.name: Alert Ingestion
skills.description: Process incoming alerts and correlate with known incidents
examples: Ingest a CloudWatch OOM alert for payment-service
Process this PagerDuty critical alert about API latency

skills.name: Escalation
skills.description: Escalate unresolved alerts to the ops team
examples: Escalate this critical alert to the ops team
This alert needs human review — escalate with findings
